code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Infra_IngressController] --> NotStarted: Test available
    
    NotStarted --> InProgress: User clicks "Start Test"
    
    state InProgress {Infra_WorkerNode] --> AnsweringQuestions
        AnsweringQuestions --> AnsweringQuestions: Select/Change answer
        AnsweringQuestions --> MarkedForReview: Mark for review
        MarkedForReview --> AnsweringQuestions: Continue answering
    }
    
    InProgress --> Submitted: User clicks submit
    InProgress --> AutoSubmitted: Timer expires
    
    Submitted --> ResultsCalculated: System calculates score
    AutoSubmitted --> ResultsCalculated: System calculates score
    
    ResultsCalculated --> Analyzed: System analyzes performance
    
    state Analyzed {Infra_EtcdCluster] --> ScoreGenerated
        ScoreGenerated --> SectionBreakdownCreated
        SectionBreakdownCreated --> TopicBreakdownCreated
        TopicBreakdownCreated --> WeakAreasIdentified
        WeakAreasIdentified --> [Infra_WorkerNode]
    }
    
    Analyzed --> PracticeRecommended: Weak topics found
    Analyzed --> [Infra_EtcdCluster]: No weak topics
    
    PracticeRecommended --> NotStarted: Practice test scheduled
    
    note right of InProgress
        attempt.status: in_progress
        Timer running
        Answers being recorded
    end note
    
    note right of Submitted
        attempt.status: submitted
        submittedAt: timestamp
    end note
    
    note right of AutoSubmitted
        attempt.status: auto_submitted
        Forced submission by system
    end note
    
    note right of Analyzed
        score, correctAnswers calculated
        sectionBreakdown JSON created
        topicBreakdown JSON created
        weak_topics updated
    end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个考试系统的状态流转图。核心流程是：学生从NotStarted开始，点击进入考试后变成InProgress，然后可以提交或者系统自动提交，最后进入结果分析。
明白。InProgress状态内部需要展开吗？比如答题、标记复查这些子状态？
需要展开。InProgress里面包含AnsweringQuestions和MarkedForReview，学生可以来回切换。另外要加上Infra_IngressController和Infra_WorkerNode作为外部依赖节点。
好的，我先把主干画出来。NotStarted到InProgress是用户点击触发，InProgress有两个出口：Submitted和AutoSubmitted，分别对应主动提交和计时器到期。
结果分析部分也要展开成复合状态Analyzed，里面依次是ScoreGenerated、SectionBreakdownCreated、TopicBreakdownCreated、WeakAreasIdentified，最后回到Infra_WorkerNode。还要接Infra_EtcdCluster。
Analyzed之后的分支我确认一下：如果发现了薄弱知识点就到PracticeRecommended，没有薄弱点就回到Infra_EtcdCluster结束流程？
对，PracticeRecommended最终会回到NotStarted，表示安排了新的练习测试。另外给InProgress、Submitted、AutoSubmitted、Analyzed四个状态加上右侧注释，说明里面的数据状态。
完成了。InProgress的注释写了attempt.status和计时器运行状态，Submitted和AutoSubmitted区分了主动提交和强制提交，Analyzed的注释包含了score、correctAnswers、sectionBreakdown、topicBreakdown、weak_topics这些计算结果。
